headline: PPL Corporation (PPL) A High Growth Utility Stock to Buy on Nuclear Energy Push
summary: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL) is one of the high growth utility stocks to buy according to analysts. On April 30, PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL) subsidiaries Louisville Gas and Electric Company and Kentucky Utilities entered into a strategic partnership with X-energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XE). The companies are joining forces to explore the potential deployment of X-energy’s Xe-100 small modular […]
